message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for .tmp/ and lcp-debug.mjs to prevent temporary
directories and debug scripts from being tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -73,3 +73,9 @@ screenshots_for_diagnostics/
 rustc-ice-*.txt
 reports/
 .agent-mail.yaml
+
+# Temporary directories
+.tmp/
+
+# Debug scripts (local only)
+lcp-debug.mjs
